# Regula

> Open-source CLI tool for EU AI Act compliance. Combines code scanning with governance questionnaires: scans codebases for risk indicators, classifies AI systems into the Act's four risk tiers (prohibited, high-risk, limited-risk, minimal-risk), and provides structured self-assessments for organisational obligations code cannot verify. Runs locally with zero external dependencies -- no API calls, no data leaves the machine. Install: `pipx install regula-ai`.

Regula combines two approaches: (1) static code analysis for risk patterns, dependency security, credential exposure, and bias indicators, and (2) questionnaire-based assessment for organisational obligations like risk management systems (Article 9), quality management (Article 17), fundamental rights impact assessments (Article 27), and post-market monitoring (Article 72). It explicitly documents what it cannot do -- see docs/what-regula-does-not-do.md.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/kuzivaai/getregula/blob/main/README.md): Installation, quick start, key commands, verified numbers
- [CLI reference](https://github.com/kuzivaai/getregula/blob/main/docs/cli-reference.md): All CLI commands and options
- [Architecture](https://github.com/kuzivaai/getregula/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): How Regula works internally
- [What Regula does not do](https://github.com/kuzivaai/getregula/blob/main/docs/what-regula-does-not-do.md): Explicit scope boundaries and limitations
- [Installation guide](https://github.com/kuzivaai/getregula/blob/main/docs/installation.md): pipx, pip, uv, and platform-specific instructions
- [Quick start](https://github.com/kuzivaai/getregula/blob/main/docs/QUICKSTART.md): First scan in under a minute
- [Evidence pack guide](https://github.com/kuzivaai/getregula/blob/main/docs/evidence-pack-guide.md): Generating compliance documentation for auditors
- [Runtime monitoring](https://github.com/kuzivaai/getregula/blob/main/docs/cli-reference.md#runtime-monitoring-article-12): Article 12 runtime logging SDK and CLI (`regula monitor`) for recording LLM calls in production
- [Precision and recall benchmarks](https://github.com/kuzivaai/getregula/blob/main/docs/benchmarks/PRECISION_RECALL_2026_04.md): Published accuracy data

## Blog

- [Does the EU AI Act apply to my app?](https://getregula.com/blog/blog-does-ai-act-apply.html): Decision guide for teams unsure about scope
- [Risk tiers explained in code](https://getregula.com/blog/blog-risk-tiers-in-code.html): How EU AI Act risk classification maps to code patterns
- [The Omnibus delay](https://getregula.com/blog/blog-omnibus-delay.html): Current status of EU AI Act implementation timeline
- [Why startups are ignoring the AI Act](https://getregula.com/blog/blog-startups-ignoring-ai-act.html): Common misconceptions about scope and deadlines
- [Scanning 10 real AI apps](https://getregula.com/blog/blog-scanning-10-ai-apps.html): What Regula finds when pointed at production code
